subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Haykalu'd-Din
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the King, Possessor of the Kingdoms. In the First Gate He hath ordained mention of His Own Self, His Very Self - verily there is none other God but Him. His are the sovereign Names unto all eternity, like unto eternity. In the Second Gate He hath ordained [3.5s]... ...Ye shall assuredly find All Good in the numerical difference between Qá’im and Qayyúm, in nine years
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو الملک ذو الملاکین قد قدر فی الباب الاول ذکر نفسه نفسه انه لا اله الی هو له الاسماء الملکی ... الابد مثل الابد قد قدر فی الباب الثانی
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @grammar and orthography, @Word of God and human limitations, @cleanliness and refinement
